test_cases.test_name: CB-TC1: No git repo in cwd exits 0 with no output
DETECT-05: getGitRoot returns null when not in a git repo
exits non-zero and prints clear error when JAVA_HOME points to nonexistent path
TC1: no project config → returns valid config (from global or DEFAULT_CONFIG)
SPEC-06: no tautological Alloy assertions (P=>P or x=x)
TRACE-08: mapToXStateEvent uses event.action as primary identity
CRED-12 — P=? [ F s=1 ]: structural verification
